content.en:
After Ye Tian said goodbye, he went back.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's copy body began to study the path of fusion of will and innate eternal rules, he knew very well that in the space-time territory, other eternal realms would not dare to take this path, so he hardly had any information as a reference, so he could only explore step by step.

Airplanes!!!!

A large number of innate eternal rules were mobilized by Ye Tian, and then mobilized the power of will to begin to try to fuse with the innate eternal rules.

He didn't know how to fuse, so he could only forcibly fuse, constantly letting his will collide with the innate eternal rules.

A certain moment.

The will shattered, and the replica body turned into a corpse, which dissipated in the blink of an eye.

"Failed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had expected this failure, but he still tried.

If you want to follow the path that others have not taken, you must go through countless attempts, which is also an inevitable process.

In the days that followed.

Ye Tian tried to fuse again and again, failed again and again, and after countless failures, Ye Tian was finally ready to try another fusion method, that is, to let the innate eternal rules try to merge into the world of will.

If the world of will is fused with the innate eternal rules, it is equivalent to letting the world of will give birth to rules, which can be regarded as a kind of fusion, and it is less difficult and easier.

Otherwise, it would be almost impossible to completely integrate his will with the innate eternal rules all of a sudden, which was also an experience that Ye Tian had summed up after countless failed attempts.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian began to mobilize a trace of innate eternal rules into one of his own will worlds, and began to merge with the will in the will world, so that rules were born within the will world.

Zizi Zizi!!!

The world of will began to collapse in the rules of fusion, and soon it completely collapsed, but Ye Tian's will was also traumatized, and his physical body was also severely damaged, but this time he did not die.

"Maybe I'm on the right track!"

Ye Tian said in surprise.

Later, he tried to fuse it a few more times, and the replica body completely shattered.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian fused the innate eternal rules with the world of will, and after many failed attempts, he gradually summed up some experience, and even groped out a prototype of the road.

Ye Tian was very firm, and his will and innate eternal rules could be fused.

Ye Tian deduced and tried at the same time, and in countless experiments, he finally had a harvest.

this day.

Ye Tian's innate eternal rules, as usual, were fused with the will in the world of will, and this time the innate eternal rules turned into silk threads and combined into a printing formation.

This kind of printing formation can be compatible with all things, so Ye Tian will have a greater success rate if he fuses with his will in this way, and he has already modified the formation and tried many times. Under his control, the innate eternal rules and the will began to merge. The dagger and the umbrella slowly merged.

It became !!

Although this is just the beginning, for Ye Tian, it is the hope of a new path.

Soon after, the innate eternal rules slowly merged with the will in this world of wills.

With this start, Ye Tian's later experiments were much smoother.

In future attempts, Ye Tian's innate eternal rules were fused with one world of will, but the path of fusion between will and innate eternal rules was endless, and he was just a beginning.

After Ye Tian's will was initially fused with the Innate Eternal Rule, he really touched the threshold of the Will Eternal Technique.

Now he knows that the Will Eternal Technique is to study the power after fusing the will with the innate eternal rules, and to exert its power in the way of creating the Eternal Technique, which is the Will Eternal Technique.

And Ye Tian now has this power, and after he gave birth to this power, he also knew its name.

The power of the will rules!

Without the birth of the power of the Will Rule, it is impossible to create the Eternal Technique, it is the power foundation of the Will Eternal Technique, and without this foundation, it is impossible to cross the threshold.

At this time, Ye Tian thought of the untouchable sword in the ruins, and he might be able to use the sword's sword aura and the power of the will rule to combine the system of power to create a sword will eternal technique that contains domineering power.

When you think of it, you do it.

Ye Tian began to try to create such a Kendo Will Eternal Technique, since he had just started to create, he didn't have high requirements, as long as he could create an ordinary Will Eternal Technique.

Since Ye Tian's strength talent was a legendary ancestor, when it came to strength, he created very quickly.

In just 100,000 eons, he had successfully created a Will Eternal Technique, second only to the top Eternal Technique.

This Will Eternal Technique is called the Will Slashing Void Sword, although it is only an ordinary Eternal Skill, but other Eternal Realms do not have the means to deal with the Will Eternal Technique, so the deterrent power of the ordinary Will Eternal Technique is even comparable to the Legendary Eternal Technique.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian also created the Will Eternal Technique in other aspects, such as the defensive range, if he created a defensive Will Eternal Technique, when he broke into the True Legend Tower, he could easily resist the attacks of those Eternal Realm's Will Eternal Realm, so that he could break to a higher level.

Before you know it, several eternal years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already created a number of Will Eternal Techniques.

For example, the defensive will eternal skill - Will Wall Light!

Speed Class Will Eternal Skill - Will Shadow Light!

In addition, Ye Tian also created another attack-type Will Eternal Technique-Will Extreme Dao Fist, which was an attack-type Will Eternal Technique that he created based on the Eternal Extreme Dao Fist.

Creating these Will Eternal Techniques, for Ye Tian, his strength has been greatly improved.

In the dark, he felt a special change in his body, although his strength did not increase, but his will increased a lot, and he was full of vitality.

What's more, Ye Tian's control over his will has increased several times.

This made Ye Tian firmly believe that this path was very correct.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the True Legend Tower again, and he was ready to break through the True Legend Tower again to see how many floors he could break through.

He was convinced that he could easily make it past the eleventh and even twelfth floors.

The eleventh floor of the Tower of True Legends.

Ye Tian appeared here, and three Eternal Realms appeared, and they all used the Will Eternal (money) technique to attack Ye Tian.

At this moment, a golden light appeared on Ye Tian's body, easily resisting the attacks of the three Eternal Realms.

This is the Wall of Will!

Legendary Eternal Skills can't completely resist the Will Attack, but ordinary Eternal Skills like Will Wall Light do, this is the Will Eternal Technique restraining the Will Eternal Technique.

"ケWill Eternal Fist.ワ!"

Ye Tian shattered out with a punch, and hundreds of millions of Will World Phantoms appeared behind him, crushing the eternal time and space, suppressing it.

The void shattered, the rules of eternity broke, and everything in front of him turned into nothingness.

And the three Eternal Realms were shocked out one after another, and they were not lightly injured one by one.

"Will slash the void sword, fall!"

A Will Slashing Void Sword slashed out of nothingness, piercing an Eternal Realm with a single sword, and the opponent's body immediately collapsed.

Soon, Ye Tian also smashed the other two Eternal Realms, and successfully broke through the eleventh layer, and it was very easy.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the twelfth floor. _
